decisions.summary: Use fs/promises readFile for loadSwarmState and wrap call in Effect.promise() since it is called inside an Effect generator
Use fs/promises mkdir/writeFile for saveSwarmState and wrap call in Effect.promise()
For createSlotWorktree and postSwarmRoute plan-copy logic, wrap async fs/promises calls in Effect.promise() to preserve error-swallowing try/catch semantics

resumePoint.description: Implementing bead workspace-gtm (Convert createSlotWorktree sync calls to async) — done, need to commit and close. All 3 beads implemented. Next: run tests, commit, push, call pan done.

sessionHistory.note: Started PAN-972. Created 3 beads and claimed workspace-p0r. Converted loadSwarmState to async.
